title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMIndoor
description: Indoor features from OpenStreetMap tagged with indoor=*. This data model is a derivative work based on the OpenStreetMap Wiki, licensed under CC BY-SA 2.0 by OpenStreetMap contributors.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMIndoor

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OpenStreetMap element.

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification of the OSM element. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

indoorType.description: Property. The OSM indoor tag classifying the indoor element. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:indoor'

level.description: Property. The floor level the element is located on (e.g., 0, 1, -1, 2). Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:level'

roomType.description: Property. The specific purpose of the room (e.g., office, shop, classroom). Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:room'

ref.description: Property. Internal reference or room number. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:ref'

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources.
